---
title: "175: Same, but different"
date: "2026-02-26"
categories:
  - gtUtils
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Load data

```{r load-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

equiv <- tibble::tribble(
  ~group, ~win, ~location, ~loser, ~score, ~wab,

  "Roughly +0.62 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Illinois", "Home", "Texas Tech", "81-77", 0.62,
  "Roughly +0.62 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Michigan St.", "Neutral", "North Carolina", "74-58", 0.62,
  "Roughly +0.62 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Vanderbilt", "Away", "UCF", "105-93", 0.63,
  
  "Around +0.61 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Virginia Tech", "Home", "Virginia", "95-85 (3OT)", 0.61,
  "Around +0.61 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Stanford", "Neutral", "St. Louis", "78-77", 0.60,
  "Around +0.61 Wins-Above-Bubble", "USC", "Away", "Minnesota", "70-69 (OT)", 0.60,
  
  "About +0.59 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Syracuse", "Home", "Tennessee", "62-60", 0.59,
  "About +0.59 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Connecticut", "Neutral", "BYU", "86-84", 0.59,
  "About +0.59 Wins-Above-Bubble", "Youngstown St.", "Away", "Grand Canyon", "90-81", 0.59,
)


# save function 
gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}

```

### Equiv table

```{r equiv-tbl, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

# built using data from wabwatch 
# wins <- wab_data |>
#  dplyr::filter(result == "W", game_type == "played", !is.na(quad))

# home_wins <- wins |> dplyr::filter(location == "H")
# away_wins <- wins |> dplyr::filter(location == "A")
# neutral_wins <- wins |> dplyr::filter(location == "N")


# triplets <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(neutral_wins)), function(i) {
#  nw <- neutral_wins[i, ]
  
#  h_match <- home_wins |>
#    dplyr::filter(team != nw$team, opp != nw$opp) |>
#    dplyr::mutate(wab_diff = abs(wab - nw$wab)) |>
#    dplyr::slice_min(wab_diff, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)
  
#  a_match <- away_wins |>
#    dplyr::filter(team != nw$team, opp != nw$opp) |>
#    dplyr::mutate(wab_diff = abs(wab - nw$wab)) |>
#    dplyr::slice_min(wab_diff, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)
  
#  if (nrow(h_match) == 0 || nrow(a_match) == 0) return(NULL)
  
#  tibble::tibble(
#    h_team = h_match$team[1], h_opp = h_match$opp[1], h_score = h_match$score[1],
#    h_date = h_match$date[1], h_quad = h_match$quad[1], h_wab = h_match$wab[1],
#    h_rank = h_match$opp_net_rank[1],
#    n_team = nw$team, n_opp = nw$opp, n_score = nw$score,
#    n_date = nw$date, n_quad = nw$quad, n_wab = nw$wab,
#    n_rank = nw$opp_net_rank,
#    a_team = a_match$team[1], a_opp = a_match$opp[1], a_score = a_match$score[1],
#    a_date = a_match$date[1], a_quad = a_match$quad[1], a_wab = a_match$wab[1],
#    a_rank = a_match$opp_net_rank[1],
#    total_diff = h_match$wab_diff[1] + a_match$wab_diff[1]
#  )
# })

# triplets |>
#  dplyr::arrange(total_diff) |>
#  dplyr::slice_head(n = 15) |>
#  dplyr::select(
#    h_team, h_opp, h_quad, h_wab, h_rank,
#    n_team, n_opp, n_quad, n_wab, n_rank,
#    a_team, a_opp, a_quad, a_wab, a_rank,
#    total_diff
#  )

equiv_tbl <- equiv |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(win, win, include_name = FALSE) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(loser, loser, include_name = FALSE) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    result = paste0(win, " ", score, " ", loser)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(group, result, location, wab) |>
  gt::gt(groupname_col = "group") |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_savant() |> 
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = c(result)) |>
  gt::fmt_number(columns = wab, decimals = 2, force_sign = TRUE) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    result = "",
    location = "Location",
    wab = "WAB",
  ) |>
  gt::tab_header(
    title = gt::html("The <em>same</em>, only <em>different</em>"),
    subtitle = gt::md("Each group of three wins earned nearly identical Wins-Above-Bubble, despite different opponents and locations.")
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "#2e7d32"),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = wab)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = gt::cells_row_groups()
  ) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(gt::html("data through February 25 games via barttorvik.com <br> Table by Chris at Bless your Chart")) |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.font.size = gt::px(14),
    heading.align = "left",
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold",
    row_group.font.size = gt::px(13),
    row_group.background.color = "#f5f5f5"
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    style = list(gt::cell_borders(
      sides = c("left", "right", "top", "bottom"),
      color = "black",
      weight = gt::px(2)  # Make it thicker than internal borders
    )),
    locations = list(
      gt::cells_body(),
      gt::cells_column_labels(),
      gt::cells_row_groups()
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(450))

gt_save_crop(equiv_tbl,
             file = "equiv_tbl.png",
             whitespace = 60,
             bg = "white")


equiv_tbl

```

###
